title: Crossbow Expansion
description: Six new Crossbows, all with unique mechanics while keeping a vanilla feel.
body:
Crossbow Expansion adds new Crossbows and Enchantments with unique mechanics while trying to be as vanilla-friendly as possible.
---

**Disc Crossbow** 

- Found in Dungeons

- Uses music discs as ammunition

- Discs bounce between enemies, piercing increases times the disc can bounce

- Discs drop after final hit

- Normal draw time, medium damage
  
**Replay Enchantment** 

- Exclusive enchantment for disc crossbow 

- Makes shot discs return to player after final hit instead of dropping 

- Same cost and rarity as infinity 

**Warden Crossbow** 

- Found in ancient city

- Uses echo shards as ammunition 

- Shoots a sonic boom like the warden 

- Long draw time, high damage

**Rage Crossbow** 

- Bought from master fletcher villager

- Shooting it gives stacks, stacks reduce draw time

- Long draw time at the start, at 5 stacks faster than vanilla crossbow

**Hand Crossbow**

- Sold by wandering trader

- Can't be loaded manually, will load itself when in hand of offhand 

- Slow arrows, so short range but fast reloads

- Can be dual wielded for maximum effect 

**Cluster Crossbow**

- Bought from master fletcher villager

- Shoots 3 Arrows in tight pattern, multi shot increases this to 9

- Slightly longer draw time and slow arrows 

**Pouch Crossbow** 

- Found in trail ruins

- Can load and shoot throwable objects like ender pearls, snowballs, potions (splash & lingering), xp bottles and eggs

- Normal draw speed and projectile speed

- Piercing enchant is now disabled on this crossbow

---

**This mod is my first mod so there may be bugs**

**Feel free to use this mod in any Modpacks and please tell me if you do**
